page: OVHcloud b2-120 is a general-purpose server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 Intel Core Processor running at 2.0 GHz. The hardware configuration includes 120.0 GB of RAM, providing 3.75 GB of memory per core. Local storage is bundled with a 400 GB SSD, and the instance is equipped with a 10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth and one complimentary public IPv4 address.

Benchmark results indicate a contrast between single-core and multi-core performance. Single-core CPU performance is poor, ranking in the bottom 10% on stress-ng and bottom 25% on Geekbench. However, multi-core performance is average, and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression is strong, placing in the top 25%. Memory bandwidth for both read and write operations remains in the average range. Static web serving throughput and database operations also perform at average levels, while LLM text generation speeds are weak to poor.

Given its dedicated physical cores and balanced memory-to-vCPU ratio, the instance offers stable resource density for multi-threaded workloads. It is well-suited for parallel processing tasks, multi-threaded decompression, general-purpose web serving, and moderate database operations. However, it is less optimal for single-threaded applications or intensive LLM text generation due to its weaker single-core performance.
description: OVHcloud b2-120 is a general-purpose server instance featuring 32 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 Intel Core Processor running at 2.0 GHz. The hardware configuration includes 120.0 GB of RAM, a local 400 GB SSD, and a 10 Gbps baseline network interface. While single-core benchmarks rank in the lower percentiles, the instance delivers average multi-core CPU performance and strong multi-threaded decompression capabilities. Memory bandwidth, static web serving, and database operations consistently perform at average levels. This resource configuration provides a balanced environment for multi-threaded processing, general web serving, and database workloads, though it is less suited for single-threaded tasks or large-scale LLM text generation. It offers a stable, dedicated resource profile for parallelized enterprise applications.
og_description: OVHcloud b2-120 is a general-purpose KVM server featuring 32 dedicated Intel cores, 120 GB of RAM, and a 400 GB local SSD. It delivers average multi-core performance and 10 Gbps network bandwidth.

tagline: A dedicated multi-core instance with balanced memory and local SSD storage, optimized for parallel processing and general-purpose workloads.

120 GB of RAM and 400 GB of local SSD storage
10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with one public IPv4 address
Strong multi-threaded decompression and average multi-core performance
Suitable for general web serving, database operations, and parallel processing
